title: Zoo Berlin vs Tierpark Berlin - Quick Summary
items: **Zoo Berlin is the compact West Berlin classic:** central, historic, easy to reach, and the safer first choice when your Berlin time is limited.
**Tierpark Berlin is the spacious East Berlin landscape day:** 160 hectares around Schloss Friedrichsfelde, better when you want a slower full-day visit.
**Choose Zoo Berlin for pandas, the Aquarium, short walking distances, and bad-weather flexibility.** It is the easier fit for most first-time tourists.
**Choose Tierpark Berlin for space, picnic rhythm, older children, dogs, handcart plans, and a park-like day that should not be rushed.**
**Do not try to visit both on the same day.** Pick the rhythm that fits your group, then check official prices and opening hours before buying dated tickets.
